mission: Stabilize the current Glitch/Hermes contract, then centralize one Hermes brain behind an authenticated recommendation API.

latest_evidence.architecture_decision: central Hermes VPS; clients poll one five-minute recommendation; Glitch executes/manages locally; Feed without Chat
latest_evidence.stabilization_findings: gateway lacked supervision; outcomes incorrectly required follower-close events; portfolio top-level position/PnL could lag nested positions
latest_evidence.stabilization_source: gateway installer uses Hermes native supervision; outcome reconciler uses TradeLedger account round trips; portfolio snapshot derives top-level position/unrealized from nested live positions
latest_evidence.runtime_blocker: deployment blocked: Sim101 flat; Sim102 and Sim103 each short 1 MNQ with zero working orders after stale follower targets reopened reverse exposure; gateway installed but stopped
latest_evidence.expansion_state: specified only; blocked on GL-047 through GL-049b and stable/profitable single-instrument paper evidence
latest_evidence.paper_preflight_reason: Sunday MNQ snapshot stale only; full 18-test suite and explicit kill-switch-first contract pass; refreshed portfolio schema is fresh and complete, telemetry and intent servers running, Sim group flat with no working orders, policy paper-safe
latest_evidence.gl_042_audit: source safety review clean; exact ownership, terminal recovery, and fresh complete group risk gates implemented
latest_evidence.gl_043_cycle_adapter: hard timeout and durable success/failure journal implemented; timeout fixture verified fail-closed with active-cycle cleanup; snapshot hash, freshness, and market price bound to one read and revalidated before group execution
latest_evidence.gl_046_corpus_audit: 1,390,411 indexed v2 rows as of 2026-07-12T21:31Z, with 141/141 payload samples clean across 2022-01-04 through 2026-03-12; index still mutated during audit and retains one append-block chronology break, so freeze and mining remain gated
latest_evidence.gl_043_idempotency_harness: NOTHING-only first-accept/duplicate-409/postcondition harness is parser-clean; full Hermes safety suite passes 19/19; runtime proof awaits a fresh MNQ feed

notes: Current branch is glitch/ai-rail. The local direct exchange is an internal stabilization harness, not the product topology. Codex is builder-only and does not run or poll trading cycles. Finish GL-047 through GL-049b, validate stable/profitable single-instrument paper behavior, then implement GL-050 through GL-054 in order.
